description: Same-colored markers are connected by straight lines. The drawn paths preserve each marker color and fill only the cells between endpoints.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_1f876c06(I):
    x1 = fgpartition(I)
    x2 = compose(last, first)
    x3 = power(last, TWO)
    x4 = fork(connect, x2, x3)
    x5 = fork(recolor, color, x4)
    x6 = mapply(x5, x1)
    O = paint(I, x6)
    return O
